hero.title: Run AI Models
hero.description: Explore and run state-of-the-art AI models powered by WebGPU — no server, no cloud, complete privacy. Your data never leaves your device.

webgpu.title: Hardware Compatibility Check
webgpu.description: Checking your device's ability to run browser-based AI models...

reasons.noGpu: Your browser does not support WebGPU. Please use Chrome 113+ or Edge 113+.
reasons.noAdapter: No compatible GPU adapter found. Your GPU may not support WebGPU.
reasons.noWasm: WebAssembly is not available in your browser.
reasons.noSharedBuffer: SharedArrayBuffer is not available. This is required for multi-threaded AI operations.
reasons.https: WebGPU requires a secure context (HTTPS). Please access the site via HTTPS.

webgpu.recommendationText: For best experience, use Chrome or Edge on a device with a dedicated GPU.
webgpu.warnLowVram: Your device has limited VRAM. Only small models (≤2GB) will work reliably.
webgpu.cpuFallback: Transformers.js models can still run via WebAssembly (CPU) without WebGPU.

models.installDescription: This will download the model to your browser cache. Download size:
models.installWarning: This may take several minutes depending on your connection speed.
models.disabledReason: Your device doesn't meet the requirements for this model.

webllm.title: WebLLM Models
webllm.subtitle: Large Language Models
webllm.description: Run powerful LLMs directly in your browser using WebGPU acceleration. Chat, generate code, and reason — all without sending data to any server.
webllm.aboutText: WebLLM is an open-source project by MLC AI that brings large language model inference directly to web browsers using WebGPU. It provides OpenAI-compatible APIs and supports a wide range of models.
webllm.noModelLoaded: No model loaded. Please select and install a model first.

transformers.title: Transformers.js Models
transformers.subtitle: Multi-Task AI Pipeline
transformers.description: Run hundreds of AI tasks in your browser using Hugging Face Transformers.js. From text analysis to image recognition and speech recognition — all powered by ONNX Runtime.
transformers.aboutText: Transformers.js is Hugging Face's JavaScript library that brings transformer models to the browser and Node.js via ONNX Runtime Web. It supports 100+ architectures for tasks across NLP, Vision, Audio and more.
transformers.noResults: Results will appear here after running the model.
transformers.label: Label

footer.description: An open-source platform for exploring and running AI models directly in your browser.

errors.modelLoad: Failed to load model. Please try again.
errors.inference: Inference failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.fileSize: File too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
